claim_boundary: this bundle freezes one small host-native plugin-conditioned dataset built from the committed derivation bundle with workflow-case-disjoint train and held-out splits. It preserves controller-surface, plugin-class, route-label, and outcome-label counts instead of collapsing the records into anonymous prompt/response rows. It does not claim scale, generalization, or mixed guest-artifact coverage by itself.
summary: plugin-conditioned dataset bundle keeps train_records=3 and held_out_records=3 under workflow_case_disjoint=true.
